message.content: @startuml actor Admin participant ":DivisionPage" as DivisionPage participant ":DivisionTableContainer" as TableContainer participant ":DivisionTable" as Table participant " :DivisionService\n(Frontend)" as FrontEndSvc participant ":Router" as Router participant ":DivisionHTTPTransport" as HTTPTransp participant ":DivisionEndpoint" as Endpoint participant ":DivisionService" as BackendSvc database ":DivisionCommand" as CommandDB database ":DivisionQuery" as QueryDB Admin -> DivisionPage: Open \"Manage Division\" Page activate DivisionPage DivisionPage->TableContainer: Render \"Division Table\" Container activate TableContainer TableContainer->Table: Render \"Division Table\"\n activate Table return rendered deactivate Table return rendered deactivate TableContainer return rendered deactivate DivisionPage note over Admin #lightgreen:green note on left\nto be continued end note == Marking Divisions == Admin -> DivisionPage:Mark \"Division\" activate DivisionPage DivisionPage->TableContainer:Mark \"Division\" activate TableContainer TableContainer->Table:Mark \"Division\" return marked deactivate TableContainer return marked deactivate DivisionPage return marked == Deleting Selected Items == Admin -> DivisionPage:Click \"Delete Selected\" Button alt [Cancel Delete] DivisionPage-->FrontEndSvc:showDeleteConfirmation(item) \nasdadasdasdsad else FrontEndSvc --> DivisionPage:Close Dialog loop ["for each uuid"] QueryDB <-#red:red line to self Bold text :italics font color=Blue size=18 CommandDb<-"Hello"-CommandDb end loop else endif while( data available? ) is yes then Read Data elseif(no more data at position x = -567; y=-39;)no stop endwhile() endif @enduml
